expectations.text: Uses streaming LLM client with event stream processing
Updates UI incrementally as tokens arrive (not after full response)
expectations.evidence: No setState inside stream loop - response only shown after complete

expectations.text: Tracks and displays progress (chunk count or similar)
expectations.evidence: No chunk counting or progress tracking implemented

expectations.text: Accumulates and displays the full response as it builds
expectations.evidence: Response only added to messages after full stream completes

claims.claim: Basic streaming without real-time UI updates
claims.evidence: Stream completes before any UI update

suggestions.assertion: Updates UI incrementally as tokens arrive
suggestions.reason: Baseline only shows response after stream completes - no real-time updates

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline lacks real-time UI patterns from skill.
